sn47.31:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. "‘This is the contemplation of the body in the body’—thus, bhikkhus,sn.v.179in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
sn47.31:1.0.2: "‘This is the contemplation of feelings in feelings’ …
sn47.31:1.0.3: "‘This is the contemplation of mind in mind’ …
sn47.31:1.0.4: "‘This is the contemplation of phenomena in phenomena’—thus, bhikkhus, in regard to things unheard before, there arose in me vision, knowledge, wisdom, true knowledge, and light.
